Inspect authors in the project

Usage:
  nectar authors [--config <path>] [--orphaned] [--json] <subcommand...>

Arguments:
  subcommand          `list` (show authors and post counts)

End of options:
  Use `--` before positional values that start with `-`, for example `nectar new post -- --config`.

Options:
  -c, --config <path> Config path(s); repeat or comma-separate to deep-merge in order
  --orphaned          Show only authors that are defined under content/authors/ but referenced by zero posts (`list` only)
  -j, --json          Emit results as JSON for CI consumption (`list` only)
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Environment variables:
  Every flag has an env var fallback (CLI flag > env var > .nectarrc > config > default).
  Naming: NECTAR_<COMMAND>_<FLAG> (uppercased, dashes become underscores).
  Example: --config → NECTAR_AUTHORS_CONFIG

Repeated flags:
  Scalar string flags use the last value.
  List-style string flags accumulate as comma-separated values in argv order.
  Boolean flags use the last positive or negated spelling.

Examples:
  nectar authors list                          # all authors + post counts
  nectar authors list --orphaned               # authors defined but unused by posts
  nectar authors list --json                   # machine-readable author inventory
